title: Crispy Sweet Adventurous Pork Belly Crumble
description: A sweet and crispy Filipino dish featuring pork belly slices combined with toast and a dash of adventurous flavors.

ingredients.name: All-Purpose Flour
ingredients.notes: To coat pork belly for crisping

ingredients.name: Peanuts
ingredients.notes: Crushed or chopped, for added texture and flavor

instructions: Mix all ingredients except pork belly in a small bowl until well combined.
Coat both sides of sliced pork belly with flour mixture and set aside.
Place slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, brush evenly with sweetened condensed milk.
Meanwhile, spread sweetened condensed milk onto toasted bread slices. Arrange coated pork belly slices on top of toast.
Sprinkle peanuts and dijon mustard over the pork belly slices.
Bake for an additional 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
